target:
It's about time…
The time when Tokiko came last loop.
But I feel a growing sense of unease…
Head that way. They've brought a bunch of islanders' shadows.

There are a lot of enemies!
They're coming this way!

I'm all set!
I'll really mess around!

Hello, Shinpei-kun, I'm sorry I'm late.
I was gathering everyone.

Hehe.
You guys are a bit short, aren't you?
Shinpei!! One of them is coming from behind Shide!

(The wound is healing…
That's why that Tokiko is…)

Greetings.
I was going to greet you all,
but…

(Damn! They took the chance
while I was distracted by Tokiko!)

That hunter's hiding.
Ugh, it's a shame my people are coming…

You know, that was dangerous.
You almost got Haine hurt.

(Blocked the bullet with the manhole cover…
Shide really has no weaknesses)

No good!
I couldn't block it!!
There was one hiding there too?

Well done!
Then, let's head to that place!
Shinpei, we've arrived at the gym!

Window, Mio!!
The shadows are chasing us!
Two of them, Mio and Tokiko!

Come on!
I'll catch them with all my might!!

I know!
I'm relying on the shadow Mio!

(The wound is healing…
That's why that Tokiko is…)
Is that a nail driver? You're really ruthless.
Shin-chan, do you want to interfere with me that much?
You have a lot of openings in your back, Shinpei-san.
You're in the way. I need to…
Mio! Why are you holding that?!

A lighter and spray!
It's a flame projector taught by Sou!
Why is Mio here too! You should have stayed back!

To catch Tokiko!
I won't let her go!

…Move aside, Mio.
I have business with Ushio-san and Shinpei.

You're kidding me!
You avoided everything?!
Making Mio fight… you're really low.
Big brother and Shinpei, you're both the worst!

No matter what you say,
our resolve won't waver!

I'll catch you and
make you tell me where the real Tokiko is!
Big brother is so calm. Always… always…

Always, always, always!
Get out of the way, or I'll crush you for real!

(They're the shadows that captured Mio
in the Hiruko Cave!)

(This is bad!
I need to save them!)

You didn't want to fight me?
You're indecisive!
Are you saying that even if it's okay?

Don't underestimate me!
I can take down these stray shadows alone!

Mio-chan, hide behind me!
If you take that directly--

Shinpei! Ushio!
Tokiko, I'll handle this!
Even if you say that, are you sure?

Don't underestimate me!
I can take down those Stray Shadows alone!

Mio-chan, hide behind me!
If you take that head-on -

But even with that strength,
your movements are a bit slow!

I'm just holding back.
You don't even understand that…
My older brother's really clueless, isn't he?

You had Ajiro and the others investigate
the Hishigata Clinic, didn't you?

You're really an idiot.
My older brother was supposed to be saved.
We had a promise…

I don't care about my older brother.
Mio… I'll protect Mio!
Huh, what are you talking about…?

Don't be fooled, Mio!
They're just trying to confuse us!

Those shadows are all
controlled by telepathy!

My older brother, you're misunderstanding.
I'm satisfied with what I'm doing.
Becoming a shadow was my own choice.

What are you talking about!?
That's not possible!!
Liar! You're being forced to say all this, aren't you!?

It's not a lie, Mio.
I made the decision myself.

By my own will,
I've died as a human.

It's better not to provoke them.
Gil's a hot-head.

Tokiko's dead? That's a lie!!
Then what about the call earlier?

That was me.
I was already a shadow then.

Whether human or not,
it doesn't matter.

Everyone thinks that Ushio
is the real Mio, right?

Then I'm the same, right?
…Or not?

No matter how you look at it,
you're just Tokiko.

I'm sorry, Tokiko.
I really am. I'm sorry!

It's my fault!
As your older brother,
I didn't know anything about the family!

You were trying so hard
to protect your mother.
That's right, isn't it?!

Ah, I know.
Your mother is a shadow.

You and your father helped them
to keep your mother alive, right?

No… You told it yourself.
In the shadow's memories.

Ajiro keeps looping time
every time he dies, returning to just before his death.
With the shadow.

The shadow can show the memories
it heard and saw during the loops to others.

When someone dies, is killed…
couldn't do anything…

In the memories the shadow showed me,
I learned many facts.
That's when I realized…
Tokiko, you're being used by the shadow!!

But… now you can change it!
Ajiro has the power to change the future!!

G… Stop meddling!
Don't question my decision!

Tokiko… stop!
Haine wants to betray you!

Betrayed? That's impossible!
Then why am I…!

There you go.
Sou's in trouble.
He's about to be crushed!

Ajiro, I'll stop them!
Save Sou and Mio!

Look at that!
How do you think Sou can win?
(Shadow Mio is blocking Sou from helping!)

(Even if I shoot from here,
it won't reach…)
(At least, I can shout to Sou…)

Damn, they're running away…
My body can't keep up!
When they go serious, they're this fast?!
